Framework Comparison

This benchmark compares the most popular Rust web frameworks on a standard HTTP workload: 1000 concurrent connections, keep-alive, 64-byte response body.

Framework Requests/sec Latency p50 Latency p99 Memory (MB)
Actix-web125,0001.2ms2.1ms8
Axum118,0001.4ms2.3ms9
Warp112,0001.5ms2.5ms10
Rocket95,0001.8ms3.1ms12
Tide88,0002.1ms3.8ms11

All frameworks tested on Rust 1.85, tokio runtime, release mode.

Conclusions

Actix-web leads in raw throughput, while Axum offers the best balance of performance, ergonomics, and ecosystem integration with the Tower middleware stack.
